name: A284753 (= 2 × A026363)
note: Kimberling conjectured −2 < (1+√3)n − a(n) < 3, proved by Fokkink–Joshi 2026
description: A relatively recent OEIS addition proved to equal 2 × A026363. Fokkink and Joshi (2026) proved Kimberling's conjecture −2 < (1+√3)n − a(n) < 3 using the Walnut automatic theorem prover and a Dumont–Thomas numeration system for the morphism 0 → 01, 1 → 0001. Its numeration base satisfies the linear recurrence Bₙ₊₁ = 2Bₙ + 2Bₙ₋₁.
